message:
style(sync): fix indentation of validation error trailer

Tightening pass on execute_flush(): the closing `)));` of the
"Database has 0 issues, JSONL has N issues" validation error was
indented one level deeper than the opening of the format!() call,
making the block look like it was nested under another expression.
Realign the trailer with the matching opening so the macro reads as
a single straightforward expression.

Pure whitespace; no behaviour change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
